experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Headquartered outside of Boston, Mass. and founded in 2001, Vestmark is a leading provider of portfolio management solutions and outsourced services for financial institutions and their advisors, enabling them to efficiently manage customized client portfolios through an innovative technology platform. experience.title: Intern
experience.description: Verizon Communications is a major American telecommunications and technology company headquartered in Basking Ridge, New Jersey. It provides wireless communication, internet services, cloud solutions, and IT consulting for both consumers and businesses.
